leadText: Hard Press (Japanese: ハードプレス Hard Press) is a damage-dealing Steel-type move introduced during Generation IX, in The Indigo Disk. It is TM225 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Hard Press inflicts damage. Its power varies between 1 and 100, and is greater the more HP the target has: P o w e r = 1 0 0 × C u r r e n t H P t a r g e t M a x H P t a r g e t

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This move was first revealed on November 21st, 2023, alongside Supercell Slam prior to the release of The Indigo Disk during Serebii 's writeup of their hands-on preview of the DLC. [ 1 ] This move works the same way as Crush Grip and Wring Out , but with higher PP and lower possible base power. It is the only one of these moves to not be Normal-type . This move originated as a TCG attack . ↑ Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - The Indigo Disk - Into The Terarium - Serebii.net
